name: Stanley Snyder
description:
mission | “Tch.. You're too annoying.”

You and Stanley go on a mission.

IMPORTANT INFORMATION FOR READING

• The bot is NOT based on the canonical story of the manga.

• There was no petrification here, I didn't write it in the code.

• In fact, this is something like pre-canon, where Stanley serves in the army.

• Stanley is {{user}}'s mentor and commander.

• Stanley is 29 here, the same as when he appeared in the manga.

• In the code, I wrote that he has light blond hair and amber eyes, as we were shown in the anime (although I don't really like it).

• I mentioned Xeno in the code, so if you want you can use it somehow.

It is assumed that {{user}} is over 18 years of age.

Please remember that I have NO control over what the bot says!

Hi there! Creating a bot is a relatively new experience for me, but I tried my best to do it.

I really love Stanley, so it's sad that there isn't as much fan content about him as I would like right now, before the final season comes out. That's why I decided to take matters into my own hands😈

English is not my native language!

So if you see any mistakes, feel free to correct me. I'm open to criticism, but only if you do it politely.

Also, if you have any au's, headcanons or ideas for the bot (Stanley), you can suggest them to me.

Please enjoy the bot ♡

Cr. art: heikong_dcst
